popularStory.headline: Familie
popularStory.description:
The Scottish House of Lindsay, of which the current Earl of Crawford and Balcarres is Chief, was founded by the brothers Sir Walter de Lindsay and William de Lindsay before 1116. 

Early in the 12th c …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Lindsay於大約1148年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Walter de Lindsay21歲，母親Mathilde De Penthievre20歲。他於1172年與Eleanor Limesi在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1189年被列為justiciar of lothian。他去世於大約1200年在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾可萊吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Lindsay于大约1148年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲Walter de Lindsay21岁，母亲Mathilde De Penthievre20岁。他于1172年与Eleanor Limesi在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1189年被列为justiciar of lothian。他去世于大约1200年在他的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾可萊吉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Lindsay was born about 1148, in Scotland, his father, Walter de Lindsay, was 21 and his mother, Mathilde De Penthievre, was 20. He married Eleanor Limesi in 1172, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. In 1189, his occupation is listed as justiciar of lothian. He died about 1200, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Craigie, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Lindsay est né environ 1148, à Écosse, son père, Walter de Lindsay, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mathilde De Penthievre, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Limesi en 1172, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. En 1189, sa profession de son indiquée est justiciar of lothian. Il est décédé environ 1200, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Craigie, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Lindsay um 1148 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Lindsay 21 und seine Mutter Mathilde De Penthievre 20. Er hat 1172 in Scotland Eleanor Limesi geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1189 ist sein Beruf als justiciar of lothian aufgeführt. Er starb um 1200 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Craigie, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lindsay è nato il circa 1148 nel Scotland, il suo padre, Walter de Lindsay, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde De Penthievre, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Limesi nel 1172, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1189, la sua occupazione è indicata come justiciar of lothian. Morì circa 1200, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Craigie, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Lindsayが約1148年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Walter de Lindsayは21歳，母Mathilde De Penthievreは20歳であった。1172年にスコットランドでEleanor Limesiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1189年，職業はjusticiar of lothianと記録されている。彼は約1200年に故郷で54歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアクレイジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Lindsay(이)가 대략 1148년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Lindsay(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde De Penthievre(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1172년 스컷랜드에서 Eleanor Limesi(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1189년, 그의 직업은 justiciar of lothian이었다. 그는 대략 1200년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 크레이기에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lindsay nasceu aproximadamente 1148, em Scotland, seu pai, Walter de Lindsay, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde De Penthievre, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Limesi em 1172, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1189, sua profissão aparece como justiciar of lothian. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1200, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Craigie, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Lindsay родился около 1148 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Walter de Lindsay было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde De Penthievre, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Limesi в 1172 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1189 году он работал по профессии justiciar of lothian. Он умер около 1200 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности креиги, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Lindsay nació aproximadamente 1148, en Scotland, su papá, Walter de Lindsay, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mathilde De Penthievre, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Eleanor Limesi en 1172, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1189, su ocupación registrada era justiciar of lothian. Murió aproximadamente 1200, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Craigie, Perthshire, Scotland.
